inline_comments: Create an HTTP instance that delegates to the Lark SDK's default instance but injects a default request timeout to prevent indefinite hangs (e.g. when the Feishu API is slow, causing per-chat queue deadlocks).
Credentials needed to create a Feishu client. Both FeishuConfig and ResolvedFeishuAccount satisfy this interface.
Create or get a cached Feishu client for an account. Accepts any object with appId, appSecret, and optional domain/accountId.
Create new client with timeout-aware HTTP instance
Create a Feishu WebSocket client for an account. Note: WSClient is not cached since each call creates a new connection.
Create an event dispatcher for an account.
Get a cached client for an account (if exists).
Clear client cache for a specific account or all accounts.
